article.title: UBER | Ubershe++ OA Round 2025

post.content:
Question 3 is standard sliding window. Something like 
```
def countSubSegments(bound, obstacleArray):
    if not obstacleArray:
        return 0
    
    left = right = res = currSum = 0
    while right < len(obstacleArray):
        currSum += obstacleArray[right]
        right += 1

        while currSum > bound:
            currSum -= obstacleArray[left]
            left += 1
        res += (right - left)
    return res
```
Question 2 naive is O(n^2). I feel like optimal solution uses monotonic stack, but not sure how to get the days in the middle. GPT gives bad answer btw, don\'t rely on it
